pages.title: What Are Importers?
pages.text: $(bold)Importers$() are blocks placed $(bold)inside the CM dimension$() that act as input gates: $(li)Receive resources from PreFab PULL faces (from Overworld) $(li)Have small internal buffer (9 item slots) $(li)$(bold)Actively push items$() into adjacent inventories $(li)Each Importer has a unique UUID for linking$(br2)$(bold)Think of Importers as$(): "Where resources from the Overworld enter your factory"

pages.title: What Are Exporters?
pages.text: $(bold)Exporters$() are blocks placed $(bold)inside the CM dimension$() that act as output gates: $(li)Send resources to PreFab PUSH faces (to Overworld) $(li)Have small internal buffer (9 item slots) $(li)Actively pull from adjacent machines every tick $(li)PreFab extracts from Exporters to send to Overworld $(li)Each Exporter has a unique UUID for linking$(br2)$(bold)Think of Exporters as$(): "Where resources from your factory exit to the Overworld"
